scores.reasoning: The homepage describes Freshdesk as a customer service platform with ticketing and support features, matching the description of a customer support ticketing and helpdesk platform.
The API docs mention API key usage via HTTP Basic Auth and OAuth 2.0 Bearer tokens, supporting the recorded auth methods of api_key, oauth2, and basic.
The support article explains that users can self-serve to get their API key from profile settings after login, and Freshdesk offers free plans and trials, supporting self_serve_free access.
The API reference shows a broad REST API v2 covering tickets, contacts, agents, and more, consistent with the recorded broad REST API surface.

Public REST API docs and self-serve API key access exist, and developers can sign up for free plans or trials to build integrations immediately, supporting the buildable_today verdict with no blockers.
